sglang.title: Use high-priority CUDA stream for overlap scheduling to reduce CPU bubbles
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In SGLang's overlap scheduling mode, the scheduler and forward pass run on separate CUDA streams concurrently. The scheduler stream handles request selection and batch preparation while the forward stream runs model inference.
We observed that when the scheduling logic runs on the default

sglang.title: [NPU] bugs fix: fix a condition bug when using speculative inference on Qwen3 and Qwen3 moe
sglang.author: shengzhaotian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The previous PR 17511  added a condition ( forward_mode.is_extend() ) to avoid using fused Triton kernel (split_qkv_rmsnorm_rope) during prefill stage. However, when using speculative inference (such as eagle3)，the condition will become invalid because the decode stage will be TARGET_VERI

sglang.title: [PD] Enable all CP ranks for KVCache transfer
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Changes:

Add an env var to allow all CP ranks for KVCache transfer instead of just cp rank 0. The env var is set to False by default since it has little performance improvement for MLA models.
Remove is_mla_backend check, now we can support Qwen3 CP as well (This PR can unblock #18233).

vllm.title: [CI] TRTLLM Gen-full Attn Test Coverage
vllm.author: ojhaanshika
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add test coverage for the TRTLLM gen-full attention pipeline in vLLM. The existing kernel-level tests (test_flashinfer_trtllm_attention.py) call the FlashInfer C++ kernels directly, bypassing the vLLM integration layer entirely. This leaves the decision logic, metadata construction, and forw

vllm.title: fix: Ensure invalid audio files return 400 error
vllm.author: jasonozuzu-cohere
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Improve validation for invalid audio files in the request (e.g. corrupted or non-audio type). Right now, invalid audio files throw a 500 error, as opposed to throwing an 400 error, and the error message itself is not user friendly. An example error message is:
{"error":{"code":500,"message":

vllm.title: [ROCm][Bugfix]: Disable AITER Triton ROPE by default
vllm.author: Rohan138
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Partially reverts #35180 by disabling the AITER RoPE implementation by default. Experiments show that for e.g. Llama 3.1 8B on large batch size (3000) scenarios, the AITER RoPE impl is up to 25% slower on gfx942.
However, we keep the +rotary_embedding custom op enabled by default on ROCm, since the

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix TP size issue for `test_gpt_oss`
vllm.author: micah-wil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Quantized Models Test is allocated to a 1 GPU agent pool in CI, but tries to run multi-GPU tests (example: https://buildkite.com/vllm/amd-ci/builds/5699/steps/canvas?sid=019cb28b-7107-44a7-adde-1af22fb4f7b7&tab=output#019cb28b-71fb-4bda-bc58-43ef57384abc/L1654)
This PR skips the multi-GPU test cases

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] Fix inputs_embeds=None bug for MM models
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a bug that VLMs see blank images when CUDA graph is enabled (while the model works fine with eager mode). The bug is actually caused by incorrect compilation; We didn't provide inputs_embeds for the initial run.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Allow mounting AWS credentials for sccache S3 auth
vllm.author: amrmahdi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add an optional secret mount for AWS credentials in the sccache build step. This allows CI systems using S3-backed sccache with IAM/Pod Identity to pass credentials into the Docker build.
The mount is required=false so it's a no-op when not provided, fully backwards compatible with existing builds.

vllm.title: [Model Runner V2] support dp & ep for spec decoding
vllm.author: izhuhaoran
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Further improve based on #35248
The key change is to trigger speculator.propose() in _dummy_run (called by execute_dummy_batch on idle DP ranks). Without this, when one DP rank has requests and enters speculative decoding, the idle rank only runs the target model forward in its dummy batch — the spe

vllm.title: [Core] Move save_tensorized_model logic to Worker
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It's cleaner for this to live in the worker, it should then work for both V1 and V2 model runners.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix coord_socket assertion in DPEngineCoreProc for offline DP mode
vllm.author: jaewonlee-fb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix assertion failure assert coord_socket is not None in process_output_sockets() when running with data parallelism in offline SPMD mode (e.g., standalone benchmarks with DP > 1).
The bug: DPEngineCoreProc.resume_scheduler() unconditionally sends coordinator messages (client_index=-1) witho

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Support async weight transfer example with platform-aware determinism
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Enables the async RL weight transfer example on ROCm by applying platform-specific settings to get as close to deterministic generation as possible.
Key changes:

Select TRITON_ATTN on ROCm and FLASH_ATTN on NVIDIA
Disable VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT on ROCm, as enabling it causes an error due to incomplet

vllm.title: Enable bnb for multiple indices weight
vllm.author: flutist
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #35845
Removed the NotImplementedError that blocked BitsAndBytes 4-bit quantization from loading fused weights with multiple shard indices.
Fixed BitsAndBytes 4-bit quantization to correctly calculate shard offsets and sizes for merged column parallel layers by using the adjust_bitsandbytes_4bit

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix EVS implementation for Qwen3 VL
vllm.author: 2ez4bz
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This should fix #30847.

Why?

Qwen3 VL requires a different EVS implementation approach compared to
Qwen2.5 VL due to its interleaved token structure.
In Qwen3 VL, video frames are separated by timestamp text tokens (e.g.,
"<0.5 seconds>") and vision marker tokens, rather than being contigu

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Improve engine ready timeout error message
vllm.author: lailoo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Bug: Engine startup timeout error message lacks actionable guidance
Root cause: TimeoutError in vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py doesn't include the timeout value or VLLM_ENGINE_READY_TIMEOUT_S env var name
Fix: Include timeout duration and env var name in both timeout error messages

Fixes #3

vllm.title: [cohere][fix][spec-decode]: fix crash when allowed_token_ids is set without penalties
vllm.author: kkt-cohere
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Bug
In apply_logits_processors in the rejection sampler, the batch size is derived from len(sampling_metadata.output_token_ids). However, output_token_ids is intentionally left as [] when no penalties, bad words, or custom logits processors are active (to avoid overhead in the async scheduli

vllm.title: Support Audio Extraction from MP4 Video for Nemotron Nano VL
vllm.author: askliar

Support Audio Extraction from MP4 Video for Nemotron Nano VL
Summary

Enables the Nemotron Nano VL model to extract and process audio tracks from MP4 video inputs, completing the Audio-Visual Language Model (AVLM) pipeline where Parakeet audio encoding was previously added
Introduces extract_audio_f

vllm.title: [Core] Remove busy loop from idle buffer readers
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
IBM bundles vLLM with SystemZ mainframes, and in these systems:

The CPU cores are extremely expensive
The systems are shared across many tenants (think multiple host operating systems and many VMs running on each) so it is important to not use any cpu cycles while not doing work.

This make
